channel.title: Mobile Hair Services Winnipeg | Haircuts, Color & Styling on Hair@Home
channel.description: Recent content in Mobile Hair Services Winnipeg | Haircuts, Color & Styling on Hair@Home

item.title: Bridal & Special Occasion Hair Winnipeg | Mobile Formal Styling
item.description:
Stunning updos and formal styles for your most important moments. Wedding hair, prom styling, graduation looks, and special occasion styling - all at your location.

Special Occasion Services & Pricing

  • Simple Updo: $35
  • Formal Updo: $45
  • Bridal Styling: $50
  • Bridal Party Packages: Available (contact for pricing)

Special Occasion Styles Explained

Simple Updo ($35)

Elegant, sophisticated styles for formal occasions.

Perfect for:

  • Weddings (guest or party member)
  • Graduation ceremonies
  • Anniversary dinners
  • Professional events

Styles include: Classic chignons, French twists, low buns, and elegant pulled-back styles.

item.title: Hair Treatments Winnipeg | Deep Conditioning & Scalp Care
item.description:
Add-on treatments to keep your hair healthy and looking its best between regular cuts and color services.

Treatment Services & Pricing

  • Deep Conditioning: $15
  • Scalp Treatment: $20
  • Repair Treatment: $25
  • Bond Builder: +$20 (add-on to color)

All treatments are add-on services and can be combined with any haircut, color, or styling service.

Treatment Options Explained

Deep Conditioning ($15)

Perfect for dry, thirsty hair that needs moisture and shine.

What it does:

item.title: Mobile Blowout & Styling Winnipeg | At-Home Hair Styling
item.description:
Professional blowout and styling services to help you look your best without leaving home. Perfect for special occasions, events, or simply treating yourself.

Blowout & Styling Services & Pricing

  • Basic Blowout: $20
  • Blowout with Round Brush Styling: $25
  • Special Occasion Styling: $35
  • Updo/Formal Style: $35-50 (see Special Occasion services)

Your Blowout Experience

What to Expect

When you book a blowout with Hair@Home:

  1. Consultation - Discuss the look you want and what’s achievable for your hair type
  2. Wash & Condition - Professional shampoo and conditioning treatment
  3. Prep - Heat protectant products applied
  4. Drying - Professional blowout technique for smooth, voluminous results
  5. Styling - Finishing touches, curls, or straightening as desired
  6. Setting - Products to help your style last

Before Your Appointment

  • Come with dirty hair (or I can wash it - either way works!)
  • Have inspiration photos ready if you have a specific look in mind
  • Ensure adequate lighting and access to an electrical outlet
  • Wear a button-up or loose top to avoid disturbing your style afterward

After Your Appointment

  • Your blowout should last 3-5 days with proper care
  • Sleep on a silk or satin pillowcase to reduce frizz
  • Use a shower cap when bathing
  • Refresh with dry shampoo between washes

Perfect For

Special Events: Weddings, parties, reunions, galas - look polished and put-together

item.title: Mobile Hair Color Winnipeg | At-Home Color Services
item.description:
Professional color services at fair prices. From root touch-ups to full color, I bring salon-quality color services directly to your home.

Color Services & Pricing

  • Root touch-up: $45
  • Single process color: $55
  • Partial highlights: $55
  • Full highlights: $65
  • Balayage: Contact for pricing (depends on length and density)

Your Color Service Experience

Before Your Color Appointment

  • Avoid washing hair for 24-48 hours before coloring (natural oils help protect your scalp)
  • No other chemical treatments for 2 weeks prior
  • Come with dry, unwashed hair
  • Wear a button-up shirt (avoid pulling clothes over your head after coloring)
  • Have photos of colors you like ready for consultation

During Your Visit

I arrive fully equipped for professional color services:

item.title: Mobile Haircuts Winnipeg | $20-30 At-Home Haircuts
item.description:
Quality haircuts at straightforward prices. No surprises, no salon markup. I bring everything needed for a professional haircut experience right to your door.

Pricing

  • Adults: $30
  • Seniors (60+): $25
  • Kids (12 & under): $20

Your Haircut Experience

When you book a mobile haircut with Hair@Home, here’s what to expect:

Before Your Appointment

  • Wear comfortable clothing
  • Come with clean, dry hair (or I can wash for you)
  • Have a chair available in a well-lit area
  • Think about the style you want - I’m happy to consult!

During Your Visit

I arrive fully equipped with:

item.title: Mobile Men's Haircuts Winnipeg | At-Home Barber Services
item.description:
Straightforward men’s haircuts with professional quality. Fades, tapers, classic cuts, and beard services - all at your convenience.

Men’s Services & Pricing

  • Men’s Haircut: $25
  • Men’s Cut + Beard Trim: $30
  • Beard Trim Only: $10
  • Beard Line-Up: $10
  • Full Shave: $15

Your Men’s Cut Experience

What to Expect

When you book a men’s haircut with Hair@Home:

  1. Consultation - Discuss your preferred style, face shape, and maintenance routine
  2. Preparation - Cape application, hair sprayed and sectioned
  3. The Cut - Professional techniques using clippers and/or scissors
  4. Detail Work - Clean neckline, sideburns, and around ears
  5. Beard Work (if selected) - Trim, shape, or line-up
  6. Finishing - Styling products applied for a polished look

Before Your Appointment

  • Have an idea of the style you want (or I can suggest options)
  • Wear a button-up or loose shirt to avoid disturbing your look
  • Ensure adequate lighting in the area where we’ll set up
  • Come with clean, dry hair (or I can wash it for you)

After Your Appointment

  • Styling tips for maintaining your look at home
  • Product recommendations (no pressure - just helpful suggestions)
  • Information about when to schedule your next cut (typically 3-4 weeks)

Popular Men’s Styles

Fade Cuts

  • Low Fade: Subtle transition from skin to hair
  • Mid Fade: Balanced fade for a classic look
  • High Fade: Bold contrast, modern style
  • Skin/Bald Fade: Complete fade to skin for a sharp look

Classic Cuts

  • Crew Cut: Timeless, practical style
  • Side Part: Classic professional look
  • Ivy League: Longer crew cut, versatile styling
  • Textured Crop: Modern, textured finish

Taper Cuts

  • Taper Fade: Gradual fade at neckline and sideburns
  • Business Taper: Professional, conservative
  • Taper + Part: Clean business-appropriate style

Beard Services

Beard Trim ($10)

  • Clean up your beard shape
  • Even out length
  • Remove stray hairs
  • neckline and cheek line cleanup

Beard Line-Up ($10)

  • Crisp edges and clean lines
  • Shape your beard precisely
  • Perfect for maintaining a well-groomed look

Full Shave ($15)

  • Traditional straight razor or modern shaver
  • Hot towel preparation
  • soothing aftershave balm
  • Clean, smooth finish

Great For

Busy Professionals: Get a sharp, professional cut without taking time out of your work day.
